Package
Description
neqsim.process.allocation
Linear recovery-factor production allocation (proxy network).

    Sets the base-case process and extracts the frozen split factors.
    SourceAllocator
    SourceAllocator.setEnforceMassClosure(boolean enforceMassClosure)
    Sets whether the result is renormalised so each custody outlet's per-component totals exactly match the base-case (measured) values.
